title: How to Pass FTMO Challenge - R2F Trading
seoTitle: How to Pass FTMO Challenge: Expert Tips by Harvest Wright
seoDescription: Learn proven strategies to pass FTMO challenge from ICT coach Harvest Wright. Get expert tips, risk management, and trading psychology insights.
headline: Master the FTMO Challenge with Proven ICT Strategies
subheadline: Discover the exact blueprint used by successful funded traders to pass FTMO evaluations consistently. Learn from 10+ years of ICT trading expertise.

keyPoints.title: Risk Management Mastery
keyPoints.text: Never risk more than 1% per trade and maintain strict daily loss limits. Consistent position sizing is the foundation that separates funded traders from failures.

keyPoints.title: ICT Market Structure Analysis
keyPoints.text: Use institutional concepts like liquidity sweeps and order blocks to time entries perfectly. Understanding smart money movements gives you the edge over retail traders.

keyPoints.title: Psychology & Discipline
keyPoints.text: Develop unshakeable mental fortitude to stick to your trading plan under pressure. FTMO challenges test your emotional control more than your technical skills.

keyPoints.title: Session-Based Trading
keyPoints.text: Focus on London and New York sessions when institutional volume drives clear market moves. Quality over quantity - fewer high-probability setups beat overtrading every time.

keyPoints.title: Consistent Profit Targets
keyPoints.text: Aim for steady 0.5-1% daily gains rather than home-run trades that increase risk. Small consistent wins compound quickly and keep you within FTMO's parameters safely.
